response.justification: Bogdan brings strong staff-level technical leadership and recent exciting alignment with MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, he falls short of the core requirement: the role explicitly needs 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, while his resume shows only 2 months in AI-focused work. Critical technical gaps include no demonstrated Python expertise (a primary required language), no knowledge of vector databases or RAG architectures, and no evidence of production AI systems building. The foundation is excellent for a forward-deployed engineer, but specific AI systems mastery is unproven.
strengths: Currently building MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq—directly aligned with the role's technical focus on AI agent infrastructure
Proven staff-level technical leadership across multiple orgs with documented mentoring (workshops, code dojos, Selenium training, FOSS4G talk)
Strong cloud infrastructure and TypeScript foundation: AWS CDK, microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby, low-latency systems expertise
concerns: Python not mentioned anywhere on resume despite being a primary required language; no evidence of Python proficiency in recent or past roles
No demonstrated knowledge of vector databases or RAG architectures—both explicitly required skills; no mention of LLM work, evaluation metrics, or AI system optimization
Only 2 months of AI/agentic systems experience (started April 2025); role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—experience is primarily general software engineering

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow alignment
